learnings: min-mem alone achieves 21.3% char reduction with 87.5% noun retention at **zero inference cost**.
llmlingua-2@0.5 reaches 45.8% char savings but noun retention drops to 82.2% (jaccard 0.67).
gpt2-selective@0.5 reaches 33.6% char savings but noun retention drops to 65.4% (jaccard 0.66).
Tiered min-mem → LLMLingua-2 compounds to **54.8%** char savings vs 45.8% for deletion alone.
min-mem → GPT-2 selective stacking yields higher total compression than either stage alone at the same keep ratio.
**Contribution framing:** min-mem is the auditable, zero-cost normalization tier; LM deletion methods are optional second stages for byte-starved deployments.
**Retrieval win:** `min-mem+llmlingua-2@0.5` keeps 100% QA accuracy while cutting memory 53% (6352 chars) — best compression at full fidelity.
